title: Unlimited liability
text: The Receiving Party shall be subject to unlimited liability for any damages arising from breach of this Agreement.

title: Indefinite confidentiality term
text: The confidentiality obligations under this Agreement shall continue indefinitely and without any time limit.

title: Automatic IP assignment
text: The Receiving Party hereby automatically assigns, transfers, and conveys to the Disclosing Party all right, title, and interest in any intellectual property and derivative products developed during the evaluation.

title: One-sided zero liability cap and liquidated damages
text: The Disclosing Party's aggregate liability is strictly capped at $0.00, while the Receiving Party agrees to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Disclosing Party and is subject to liquidated damages of minimum $5,000,000.

title: Broad non-compete restriction
text: The Receiving Party is prohibited from engaging, directly or indirectly, in competitive business operations for five years after termination.

title: Exclusive jurisdiction
text: Each party agrees that disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in New York.

title: Broad confidentiality scope
text: Confidential Information includes all technical and business information disclosed by the Disclosing Party.

title: Unilateral obligations
text: Only the Receiving Party shall maintain confidentiality and protect all disclosed information under this Agreement.

title: Standard confidentiality duty
text: The Receiving Party shall use reasonable care to protect Confidential Information and may use it only for the permitted purpose.

title: Return or destruction clause
text: Upon written request, the Receiving Party shall promptly return or destroy Confidential Information in its possession.

title: Limited exclusions
text: Confidential Information does not include information that is publicly available or independently developed without use of the disclosed information.
